description: Use this API routine to modify the data of an existing induction machine in the working case, or to add a new induction machine to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Induction Machine Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = induction_machine_data(ibus, id, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of twenty three elementsNone. (input).

intgar.description: STAT, induction machine status (1 by default).
SCODE, machine standard type (1 for NEMA, 2 for IEC) (1 by default).
DCODE, machine design code (0 for custom, 1 through 5 for MEMA designs A through E) (2 by default).
AREA, area number (area of bus IBUS by default).
ZONE, zone number (zone of bus IBUS by default).
OWNER, owner number (owner of bus IBUS by default).
TCODE, type of mechanical torque variation (1 for simple power law, 2 for WECC model) (1 by default).
BCODE, base machine power code (1 for mechanical power 2 for electrical power drawn) (1 by default).
PCODE, power setpoint code (1 for mechanical power 2 for electrical power drawn) (1 by default).

realar.description: MBASE, machine base power (SBASE by default).
RATEKV, machine rated voltage (kV line to line); 0.0 for bus base voltage (0.0 by default).
PSET, machine power setpoint in MW (positive for a motor) (0.0 by default).
H, machine inertia in pu on machine base power (1.0 by default).
A, load torque variation constant (1.0 by default).
B, load torque variation constant (1.0 by default).
D, load torque variation constant (1.0 by default).
E, load torque variation constant (1.0 by default).
RA, armature resistance (0.02494 by default).
XA, armature leakage reactance (0.07482 by default).
XM, magnetizing reactance (2.32786 by default).
R1, first cage resistance (0.02078 by default).
X1, first cage reactance (0.09145 by default).
R2, second cage resistance (0.12471 by default).
X2, second cage reactance (0.03326 by default).
X3, third reactance (0.0 by default).
E1, first voltage point on saturation curve (1.0 by default).
SE1, saturation factor at E1 (0.04 by default).
E2, second voltage point on saturation curve (1.2 by default).
SE2, saturation factor at E2 (0.2 by default).
IA1, starting stator current for applying stator leakage reactance saturation (1.0 by default).
IA2, stator current at wiich the stator leakage reactance is fully saturated (5.0 by default).
XAMULT, Xa multiplier at full leakage reactance saturation (1.0 by default).

error_codes.description: machine identifier is more than two characters.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid machine status. - invalid machine standard code. - invalid machine design code. - invalid area, zone or owner number. - invalid mechanical torque variation method code. - invalid base power code. - invalid power setpoint code. - machine base power is not positive. - machine rated voltage is negative. - machine rated voltage is ignored because the bus has no base voltage specified for it. - bus base voltage and machine rated voltage differ by more than 20%. - power setpoint exceeds the threshold determined from the standard code and the power setpoint code. - invalid machine inertia. - magnitude of load torque variation constant D is not between 0.2 and 5.0. - the sign of load torque variation constant D is not consistent with that of the machine power setpoint. - machine parameter is negative. - XM is not positive. - Rn or Xn exceeds 999.0. - Rn and Xn are both 0.0. - one of R1 and Xn is 999.0 and the other is not. - E1 is greater than E2; interchanging E1 and E2. - E1 and E2 are equal. - SE1 is greater than SE2; interchanging SE1 and SE2. - IA1 is greater than IA2; interchanging IA1 and IA2. - IA1 and IA2 are equal. - XAMULT must be between 0.0 and 1.0. - area, zone or owner table is full.
